name: medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For medical clinics processing 10–20 invoices/month, inefficient record handling causes cash flow gaps. We automate form conversion instead of manual data entry into insurance forms.
problem_solved: Timely conversion of patient records into insurance submission forms.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Timely conversion of patient records into insurance submission forms.

locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry into insurance forms
